title: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Employment > Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers 23 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Hispanic/Latino Community BLACK PARENT INITIATIVE SAWUBONA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific services and information to promote optimal health. On site food and child care are available for scheduled events. Direct services include: -Parenting support and educational services aimed at mobilizing Black parents to ensure their children achieve educational excellence -Employment services: development, placement, and support -Family Literacy and STEAM fairs -Cultivating Culture: Gardening and healthy eating program -Advocacy for African American families with young children in need of early intervention/early childhood special education -Parent University classes and experiences focused on: Parental engagement in children's education, effective parenting, and all areas of optimal health (intellectual, physical, emotional, spiritual, socio-economic, and relationships) 901 NE Glisan Street Suite 250 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Classes are usually held Thursday nights. Email (503) 284-8000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY CENTRO DE PROSPERIDAD HILLSBORO JOB SEARCH AND EMPLOYEE DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps to remove barriers to employment and provide training and education that people might need for their new job or for their current job. Job Club also offers support with online job searching, resume building and interview preparation. 265 SE Oak Street Suite A Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 336-9895 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN FAMILY & COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS FOR CLACKAMAS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides customized employment and training activities. The goal is to prepare as many clients as possible for unsubsidized employment with employers identified through job development activities. 821 Main Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but some programs have specialized target populations, such as public assistance recipients, public housing residents, and individuals involved with the County Corrections Department Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm, Friday by appointment Email (503) 655-8840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERSEALS OREGON EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists those who seek employment, training assistance, and social engagement. Offers training assignments to develop current employment skills, resume and cover letter education, job readiness classes, and individual employment plans. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Ages 55 and older, unemployed, and income for the last 6 months must be below 125% of the federal poverty guidelines. Social Security benefits and some other incomes do not count towards income. -Be unemployed and willing to obtain competitive employment -Priority given to veterans, spouses of veterans, homeless or at-risk of becoming homeless, and people with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 222-8500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES JOB CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vocational services to individuals with barriers to employment. Offers career counseling, job leads and referral, resume and application assistance, interview preparation, connection to community resources, access to computer, printer, and phones and more. Also administers SNAP Training and Employment Partnership (STEP) which provides supervised job search, job search training and support, vocational training, and support services to individuals receiving SNAP that are eligible STEP. 1010 Green Acres Road Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Job Connections: Tuesday 1pm-4pm and Wednesday 9am-noon Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 345-1801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES GOODWILL WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT JOB CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vocational services to individuals with barriers to employment. Offers career counseling, job leads and referral, resume and application assistance, interview preparation, connection to community resources, access to computer, printer, and phones and more. Also administers SNAP Training and Employment Partnership (STEP) which provides supervised job search, job search training and support, vocational training, and support services to individuals receiving SNAP that are eligible STEP. 855 Seneca Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Job Connections is open to the general public. STEP: SNAP recipients not receiving TANF benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 431-3309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a job search program that partners with clients to create a personalized job strategy based on their strengths and goals. Services include resume and cover letter support, job leads and hiring events, and interview practice. 1943 SE Sixth Avenue Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by location Email (503) 238-6100 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides job training, individualized career and life coaching, personal finance and life skills education, job placement, and work experience opportunities. Works with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) program. Also provides job placement and support for ex-offenders in addition to a welfare to work program. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 887-8495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION WORKFORCE EMPOWERMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides workforce development assistance including computer training, tutoring in English or ESL classes, application assistance, resume assistance, small business development workshops and advice, and information and referral for employment and training opportunities. 2680 NE Twin Knolls Drive Suite 110 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on individuals who identify as Latino or Hispanic Hours: (541) 316-5456 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF MULTNOMAH COUNTY EAST JOBS OFFICE, CHILD WELFARE, SELF-SUFFICIENCY, FAMILY STABILITY AND EMPLOYMENT, AND TEEN PARENT SELF-SUFFICIENCY JOBS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Steps to Success, a partnership between ODHS and Portland Community College, is an integrated program that provides individuals with the tools to become self-sufficient. This program provides intensive assistance, job search skills and training, assistance to receive a GED or ABE, counseling services, alcohol/drug programs, and employment services. JOBS is the state's employment and training program for people receiving public assistance. One segment of the JOBS program, known as JOBS Plus, places TANF recipients in limited-duration training positions with private employers. 11826 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (971) 673-0909 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CAF MULTNOMAH COUNTY GRESHAM SELF-SUFFICIENCY JOBS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF JOBS is the state's employment and training program for people receiving public assistance. One segment of the JOBS program, known as JOBS Plus, places TANF recipients in limited-duration training positions with private employers. 635 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 102 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (503) 673-8500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PHOENIX WELLNESS CENTER SUPPORTIVE EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help with job searching, assistance with training/training costs, resume building, job interview skill building, job development, on-the-job visitation, job coaching, transportation, and consultation with the employer. 145 N Coast Highway Unit B Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals with a past or present substance use disorder diagnosis Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 272-5048 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE SE WORKS FOSTER WORKSOURCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources to help unemployed and underemployed people find jobs, connect with the right employers, get training for in-demand careers, and meet the requirements for unemployment benefits through a network of public and private partners. Also, help businesses find skilled workers, grow their workforce, and access job training and pre-layoff support services. 6401 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE SE WORKS FOSTER PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps immigrants and refugees find long-term jobs based on the degrees or certificates they earned in their home countries. Provides a career coach to help with credential recognition, creating an employment plan, understanding American workplace culture, and ongoing job placement support. Also offers education and skills training through on-the-job training, paid internships, and workshops. 6401 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Immigrants with degrees or certifications from a country that is not the United States of America Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2330 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE SE WORKS HAROLD WORKSOURCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources to help unemployed and underemployed people find jobs, connect with the right employers, get training for in-demand careers, and meet the requirements for unemployment benefits through a network of public and private partners. Also, help businesses find skilled workers, grow their workforce, and access job training and pre-layoff support services. 8044 SE Harold Street Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE SE WORKS HAROLD PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps immigrants and refugees find long-term jobs based on the degrees or certificates they earned in their home countries. Provides a career coach to help with credential recognition, creating an employment plan, understanding American workplace culture, and ongoing job placement support. Also offers education and skills training through on-the-job training, paid internships, and workshops. 8044 SE Harold Street Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Immigrants with degrees or certifications together for job seekers and businesses: -Provide resources to help unemployed and underemployed individuals connect with the employers that are right for them, find the jobs they are looking for, get trained for the jobs they want, and meet unemployment benefit requirements -Ensure businesses have access to a skilled, work-ready talent pool aligned with industry needs -Provide employers with resources to strengthen their workforce and grow their business -Offer job training, career development, and pre-layoff support services Locator Salem, OR 97311 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours:
